issued_sql: SELECT * FROM analytics.mart_revenue_daily ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT * FROM analytics.mart_revenue_daily ORDER BY date_day DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT shipped_at::date as ship_day, count(*) as shipment_rows, count(distinct order_id) as distinct_orders, count(*) - count(distinct order_id) as dup_rows FROM raw.raw_shipments WHERE shipped_at >= '2026-06-20' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT ordered_at::date as order_day, count(*) as rows_in_int, count(distinct order_id) as distinct_orders FROM analytics.int_orders_joined WHERE ordered_at >= '2026-06-20' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT avg(orders_count) as avg_pre FROM analytics.mart_revenue_daily WHERE date_day < '2026-06-27' AND date_day >= '2026-06-01';
SELECT avg(orders_count) as avg_post FROM analytics.mart_revenue_daily WHERE date_day >= '2026-06-27';
